   Sara: MikroTik RouterOS Security Inspector
   Developer: Magama Bazarov (Caster)
   Contact: magamabazarov@mailbox.org
   Version: 1.3.0
   Documentation & Usage: https://github.com/caster0x00/Sara
 usage: sara [-h] {audit,cve} ...
 
 positional arguments:
 {audit,cve}
   audit      Run RouterOS security configuration audit
   cve        Run RouterOS CVE audit (live or by version)
 
 options:
 -h, --help   show this help message and exit

apt_metadata.description:
RouterOS Security Inspector
This package contains an autonomous RouterOS configuration analyzer for
finding security issues on MikroTik hardware.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use sara because ### sara.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `sara [-h] {audit,cve} ...` as documented upstream for sara.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair sara with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `sara --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

arguments.name: -h
arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for sara.

documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install sara. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `sara [-h] {audit,cve} ...`.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: ### sara.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install sara
Install with: sudo apt install sara
